title: Consistent Netherite
description: Makes Netherite tools fit-in more, while still being unique.
body:
![Banner](http://kckarnige.github.io/res/packBanner2.png)
#

**Makes Netherite tools fit-in more, while still being unique.**

**Compatible with [Additional Additions](https://modrinth.com/mod/addadd), [Slow Your Roll](https://modrinth.com/mod/slow-your-roll), [AdventureZ](https://modrinth.com/mod/adventurez), and [BetterEnd](https://modrinth.com/mod/betterend)!**

This is just a simple little resource pack that makes Netherite tools fit-in more with the other Vanilla tool types, while still keeping it's unique qualities and aesthetic.

## Q&A

### Q: Can I use this in my modpack?

A: Of course, and I'd appreciate it if you'd credit me in the description!

### Q: Can I redistrubute this?

A: Unless you're in a third-world country, no.

### Q: How can I support what you do?

A: If you like what I do, you can donate to my [Ko-Fi](https://ko-fi.com/kckarnige), my [CashApp](https://cash.app/$kckarnige), or [buy me a coffee](https://buymeacoffee.com/kckarnige)!
